name: Mae Hong Son valley civic and airport core
notes: Provincial capital cluster with airport, bus terminal, hospital, municipal market, and everyday town activity that should carry more year-round weight than tourism alone.

name: Pai service and tourism town core
notes: Pai is still tourism-led, but the town has repeat service demand from hospital, bus terminal, lodging, food, and market activity beyond pure scenic stops.

name: Mae Sariang Route 108 service corridor
notes: South corridor service town on Route 108 with hospital and government services; useful for corridor charging more than mountain tourism logic.

name: Khun Yuam mid-corridor service town
notes: Mid-province stop between Mueang and Mae Sariang with district services and hospital support; helps the main corridor read as more than sparse mountain flow.
